headline: Electric Fuel Cell Vehicle Manufacturer Nikola's Offering Sends Stock Plunging
summary: Shares of Nikola (NASDAQ: NKLA) traded sharply lower in Friday's session as the SEC released news of Nikola offering 23,890,000 common shares.

headline: China-Made Tesla Model 3 Will Ditch Cobalt, Use CATL Batteries
summary: Contemporary Amperex Technology (CATL) has confirmed they will be supplying Tesla Inc's (NASDAQ: TSLA) Gigafactory Shanghai with batteries for use in the Standard Range Plus Model 3,
